creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
I did a package add of tkman-2.0 using /stand/sysinstall (made 3-Nov),
	with the version setting of 2.2.5-RELEASE and ftp from wcarchive for
	the media.

	tkman-2.0 was correctly added, but not the rman and glimpse packages.
	(they aren't in /pub/FreeBSD/packages-2.2.5/All)  No indication was
	given that there were un-resolved package dependancies.

	(sysinstall is supose to handle them, right?)

How-To-Repeat: 
	/stand/sysinstall -> c -> 8 -> misc -> tkman -> <space> -> install
	/usr/local/bin/tkman
